allow: PowerShell(Get-ChildItem -Path "C:\\Users\\User\\Desktop\\AllBuild Group" -Recurse -File | Where-Object { $_.Extension -match '\\.\(html|css|js\)$' } | Select-Object FullName | Sort-Object FullName)
